name: Fatfur kidnapped escape
description:
This is an attempt to escape a big warehouse that you were kidnapped and wakened up here. Your job is to escape the place or else get caught trying to leave why the kidnappers and you will get captured and fatten or inflated to the point your immobilized and can't escape at all. If you want or found something that need to be fix please comment it so I can get to it. ♡Thank you for chat with my characters♡

☆Fix 0.4☆ i fix the bad spelling and added one extra ending so there's 4. Also added a big orca that is hard to find that can help you if you bribe him. He is supposed to be not easy to find so I made him hidden in a pacific room to hopefully not be find so easily if he is please tell him so I can fix it.
